summary: Iteration 5 — Verified Quiet Zones Reminder rename, Hebrew (he) removal, share-all bug-fix, improved PlaceSearch (viewbox/limit/category inference) and new icons. Backend regression: 30/30 pytest pass. Frontend: app title='Quiet Zones Reminder — Smart Silent Reminder' confirmed (HTML <title>, header brand 'Quiet Zones Reminder', manifest.name). Language selector has exactly 16 codes [en,ar,es,fr,de,it,pt,ru,tr,id,zh,ja,ko,hi,fa,ur] — Hebrew (he) is absent. translations_extra.js has no `he` block, index.css has no html[lang='he'] rule, backend has zero Hebrew references. Manifest.json valid: name='Quiet Zones Reminder', short_name='QuietZones', 8 icons including maskable (icon-maskable-512.png) and apple-touch-icon.png. Service worker VERSION='qz-v3' confirmed for cache invalidation. share-all-btn on Places page works end-to-end: opens ShareDialog with QR canvas and link 'https://lang-arabic-22.preview.emergentagent.com/s/b28ff80e7e' (/s/{id} format). 0 page errors during testing. PlaceSearch.jsx code review confirms: viewbox (~0.5° around user location) param added when location available, limit='10', addressdetails/extratags/namedetails enabled, inferCategory() maps Nominatim type/class to app categories (mosque/church/school/university/hospital/library/work/home). AddPlaceDialog.handleSearchSelect uses r.category to update form.category when current is default 'mosque'.
critical_code_review_comments: PlaceSearch.jsx viewbox order is 'left,top,right,bottom' but Nominatim docs sometimes vary; current encoding (lng-d, lat+d, lng+d, lat-d) is correct (x1,y1,x2,y2 with x=lng,y=lat). OK.
PlaceSearch debounce 450ms + AbortController on each keystroke is well-handled.
AddPlaceDialog.handleSearchSelect only auto-fills name when form.name is empty (f.name || r.name) — good UX preserving user typing.
Category inference falls back to keeping current category when r.category is null — prevents reset to other.
Service worker uses qz-v3 with prefix-based cache cleanup — old qz-v1/v2 caches will be deleted on activate. Good.
Manifest has 8 icons (72,96,144,192,384,512,maskable-512,apple-180) — covers all PWA install sizes.
translations_extra.js is a single ~230 line module with all 14 languages inline — file is fine but if more languages added consider splitting by lang for code-splitting.
share-all-places-btn in SettingsPage is gated by places.length>0 — correct, mirrors share-all-btn behavior on PlacesPage.

success_rate.frontend: share-all-btn on Places verified working with QR+link; share-all-places-btn in Settings code-verified (same context, identical pattern, places.length>0 guard) but timing/scroll prevented direct DOM hit in this run — low risk.

test_credentials: None — qz_user_id stored in localStorage; tests use a unique TEST_iter5_* uid per run
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 TEST_ places (mosque + library) per UI test run via POST /api/places, cleaned up via DELETE at end of each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: localStorage key for user is qz_user_id (NOT qz_device_id). Bottom nav testids: bottom-nav-map, bottom-nav-places, bottom-nav-history, bottom-nav-settings. share-all-btn (Places header) and share-all-places-btn (Settings list, requires places.length>0 and scroll into view). Languages now 16 — no Hebrew. ShareDialog renders [role='dialog'] with input[readonly] for the link and canvas for QR. Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests (30 tests).
rca of the issue: n/a — all changes verified clean. Hebrew removal: confirmed in 3 places (languages.js, translations_extra.js, index.css) + backend; share-all bug fix: confirmed working with /s/{id} link and QR rendering; PlaceSearch enhancements: code-reviewed and correct.
